description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with a flat, extended wooden roof that creates deep overhangs on multiple sides. The structure is primarily composed of clean, white walls with large glass sections at the front, allowing for ample natural light. The front facade includes a prominent porch area bordered by low railings and small decorative plants. The side views reveal a staggered, L-shaped footprint, with the roof extending asymmetrically to shelter both the porch and a secondary side entrance. The rear of the bungalow is solid and windowless, emphasizing privacy. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on geometric lines and open, airy spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white walls, large front glass panels, and a deep overhanging wooden roof. Features a prominent porch and minimalist, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide wooden roof overhang, large glass panels, and a spacious porch with railings and plants.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the L-shaped layout, extended roof, and partial visibility of the porch and side entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, windowless white wall and the full extent of the flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the staggered structure, roof overhang, and partial porch visibility.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing glass panels
